subject: [PATCH v3 00/11] mm: PMD-level swap entries for anonymous THPs

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with PMD swap entries being split into PTE-level swap entries when the cache has per-slot state, leading to incorrect rmap metadata updates. Suggested adding additional checks and handling for this scenario.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Expressed interest in the patch series and asked for more information on how PMD swap entries are handled during swap-in.

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Responded to David's concerns by explaining the current handling of PMD swap entries and proposing additional checks to address the issue.

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Addressed David's concerns by adding additional checks and handling for the scenario where PMD swap entries are split into PTE-level swap entries.

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch series introduces PMD-level swap entries for anonymous THPs, allowing them to survive the swap round-trip and be restored directly on swap-in without waiting for khugepaged to collapse the range later.
